results.title: Kerala University Syndicate explores PSC recruitment for aided college teachers
results.description: Kerala University Syndicate considers PSC recruitment for aided college teachers to address irregularities and financial burdens in promotions.

results.title: Who Is Matthew Aaron VanDyke? Why A Delhi Court Allowed Him Special Diet In Tihar Jail
results.description: A Delhi court has allowed NIA accused Matthew Aaron VanDyke to receive a special vegetarian diet, cooking facilities and medical support inside Tihar Jail, citing humanitarian and health grounds.
